# Header Override

> Header Override is a lightweight browser extension for modifying HTTP headers and cookies with local rules.

Header Override is built for developers, QA engineers, support engineers, and technical users who need to test APIs, staging environments, feature flags, cookies, and request-specific behavior without changing application code.

The extension stores rules locally in the user's browser. It does not use analytics, tracking, advertising, remote code, external servers, or third-party data sharing.

## Key Pages

- [Header Override homepage](https://headeroverride.com/): Product overview, demo video, screenshots, common use cases, and installation status.
- [Privacy Policy](https://headeroverride.com/privacy): Details about local browser storage, permissions, data handling, and non-collection policy.
- [Contact](https://headeroverride.com/contact): Main developer, GitHub repository, and support or enhancement contact for Header Override.
- [Sitemap](https://headeroverride.com/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable list of canonical public pages.
- [Robots policy](https://headeroverride.com/robots.txt): Crawler access policy for search engines and AI crawlers.
- [Full LLM content](https://headeroverride.com/llms-full.txt): Complete machine-readable product, privacy, and contact content.
- [Markdown homepage](https://headeroverride.com/index.md): Markdown version of the homepage.
- [Markdown Privacy Policy](https://headeroverride.com/privacy.md): Markdown version of the privacy policy.
- [Markdown Contact](https://headeroverride.com/contact.md): Markdown version of the contact page.

## Product Facts

- Product name: Header Override
- Category: Browser extension, developer tool, HTTP header and cookie modifier
- Primary use: Modify HTTP headers and cookies with scoped local rules
- Data handling: Local browser extension storage only
- Tracking: No analytics, no advertising, no tracking
- Current availability: Chrome extension available; Edge and Firefox versions are under store review
- Current version: 1.0.4
- Profile support: Up to five local profiles with selected-profile JSON import and export
- Main developer: Orest Kreminskyi
- GitHub repository: https://github.com/headeroverride/headeroverride
- YouTube demo: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3nKLDLxxrcI
- Support contact: support@headeroverride.com
- Canonical website: https://headeroverride.com/

## Common Use Cases

- Send debug headers to staging APIs without changing application code.
- Reproduce customer-specific headers or cookies with scoped local rules.
- Toggle backend flags while testing browser UI flows.
- Switch between client, environment, or test-account setups with profiles.
- Document temporary QA rules before removing them.

## Preferred Description

Header Override is a lightweight browser extension that lets users modify HTTP headers and cookies with local rules for API debugging and staging environments.
